meta.title: Mordekaiser — the Iron Revenant
meta.description: A cinematic tribute to Mordekaiser, the Iron Revenant of League of Legends.

home.tagline: Death is not the end of ambition.
home.disclaimer: Mordekaiser and League of Legends are creations of Riot Games. This unofficial fan project follows Riot Games' "Legal Jibber Jabber" policy. Riot Games does not endorse or sponsor this project.

wildlands.title: The Wildlands
body: Before the iron, there was flesh. Sahn-Uzal rode at the head of a horde that devoured the northern wildlands, and no wall, no army, no god of the plains could slow him.

He burned and conquered not for gold, but for faith. The shamans had promised that the greatest warriors would feast forever in the Hall of Bones — and no warrior was greater than Sahn-Uzal. Of that, he was certain.

greyWaste.title: The Grey Waste
body: Death came, as it comes for all. But there was no hall, no feast, no reward. Only a grey waste without horizon, wrapped in aether-mist and haunted by discordant whispers.
The heat of life drained out of him. Lesser souls dissolved into the fog around him — but rage is a kind of fuel, and Sahn-Uzal refused to fade.

forge.title: The Forge
body: Without flesh or bone, he bent his will across the veil. Sorcerers bound his spirit into plates of black metal, forged in the image of his old armor.
He rose as a revenant of iron and hate, and spoke his spirit-name in Ochnun, the tongue of the dead:

realm.title: The Death Realm
body: Twice slain and thrice born, he no longer fears the grey waste. He rules it.

By force of will alone, Mordekaiser carved out his own Death Realm — a battlefield in another dimension that exists for him and his prey, and no one else. Those dragged inside face the Iron Revenant utterly alone.

incarnations.title: Incarnations
incarnations.subtitle: Fourteen forms of the Iron Revenant.
